name: Atenia Skin Clear Cleanse Oil Eco Pack
pros: Removes waterproof makeup and SPF effectively without harsh scrubbing
Eco-friendly refill pack reduces plastic waste at reasonable price point
Lightweight, non-comedogenic formula suits combination and oily skin types
cons: Leaves slight oily residue if not followed by proper face wash
Fragrance may irritate sensitive skin despite hypoallergenic claims
shortDescription: Affordable Japanese oil cleanser with 44k+ reviews and eco-packaging option.
review: Atenia's Skin Clear Cleanse Oil is a tried-and-tested staple among expats in Japan—nearly 45,000 reviews speak to its reliability. The eco pack format is particularly appealing for environmentally-conscious residents. It works well for most skin types and is readily available in drugstores, though you'll need a second cleanser to fully remove residue. Great introductory cleansing oil at genuine Japanese pricing.
